name: Mutual NDA - Standard Terms
description: Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement standard terms covering confidentiality obligations, permitted disclosures, and protections for shared confidential information between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, including fillable fields for purpose, effective date, term, confidentiality period, governing law, and signature blocks.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement standard terms for SaaS products, covering access and use, restrictions, privacy, payment, term, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper Design Partner Agreement for early-access product partnerships, covering product access, feedback obligations, confidentiality, intellectual property, and disclaimers.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement standard terms defining uptime targets, response time commitments, service credit remedies, and termination rights for cloud services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper Professional Services Agreement standard terms for consulting and services engagements, covering deliverables, intellectual property, payment, warranties, and indemnification.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement standard terms for GDPR and data protection compliance, covering processing obligations, restricted transfers, security incidents, audits, and data deletion.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper Partnership Agreement standard terms for business partnerships, covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, and indemnification.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper Software License Agreement standard terms for on-premise or installable software, covering licensing, restrictions, payment, warranties, liability, and indemnification.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper Pilot Agreement standard terms for product trial and evaluation periods, covering pilot access, restrictions, disclaimers, liability limits, and confidentiality.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper Business Associate Agreement standard terms for HIPAA compliance, covering PHI safeguards, breach notification, subcontractor obligations, and data rights.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper AI Addendum standard terms supplementing existing agreements with AI-specific provisions covering model training restrictions, input/output ownership, and AI disclaimers.
